scripts.test: npm run build && npm run pw -- sh -c 'npx bddgen && npx playwright test'
scripts.test:visual: npm run build && npm run pw -- npx playwright test --project=visual
scripts.test:bdd: npm run build && npm run pw -- sh -c 'npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project=bdd-mobile --project=bdd-desktop'
scripts.test:update: npm run build && npm run pw -- npx playwright test --update-snapshots --project=visual
